levels.name: Ruined Keep — Great Hall
levels.description: Fallen beams, a cold hearth, and the collapsed barracks beyond a spill of rubble.

levels.name: Ruined Keep — Crypt
levels.description: Stone shelves and old bones. Something large breathes in the dark.
inscriptions: Here lies the last steward, sword in hand. The crown sleeps deeper than the dead.

levels.name: Temple of Light — Sanctuary
levels.description: Sunlight through stained glass; the altar glows. A narrow stair descends behind the chancel.
inscriptions: Light keeps the door; the faithful keep the light.

levels.name: Temple of Light — Crypt
levels.description: The priests of old sleep in stone drawers. Some sleep less soundly.
inscriptions: Brother Anselm's candle never burned out. It was carried below.

levels.name: Wizard's Tower — Entry Hall
levels.description: Coats on hooks, a dozing cat of uncertain solidity, and a spiral stair.
inscriptions: Alzara's tower. Knock, or don't — the tower already knows.

levels.name: Wizard's Tower — Library
levels.description: Shelves curve impossibly. Three sigils glow on the floor, and the stair above shimmers behind a ward.
inscriptions: Moon before Sun, Sun before Stars — so the sky is read from below.

levels.name: Wizard's Tower — Menagerie
levels.description: Cages of brass and glass. Most are empty. Most.

levels.name: Wizard's Tower — Observatory
levels.description: The roof is glass and the night leans close. A chest waits beneath the great lens.
inscriptions: To the patient reader of skies: take what you came for.
